features.name: specify block with setuphold system task and delayed signals
features.description: Code should include a specify block containing $setuphold system task with edge-sensitive signals (posedge/negedge) and delayed signal arguments

features.name: delayed signal assignment from clock edge
features.description: Code should include an assign statement connecting a delayed signal to its original signal source
features.snippet:
assign delayed_CLK = clk;
assign delayed_D = d;
